localized_texts.text: Museum of Ice Cream Admission
Scoop a multi-sensory experience full of UNLIMITED ice cream and playtime in journey through ice cream-themed installations, where you can finally rediscover your inner kid!

Access to 12 uniquely ice cream installations - Unlimited ice cream in different forms and flavours across 5 dessert stationsOpportunities for fun and connection in imaginative play spaces For Premium Ticket holdersAn additional Premium Ticket-exclusive flavour at 5 ice cream stations 1 complimentary beverage redemption per ticket at Scream’s Diner (bottled water/ soft drinks/ coffee)
For more information, visit our FAQs on our website.
Tickets can only be refunded or rescheduled if MOIC Ticket Insurance is purchased as an add-on upon checkout.
Your ticket entitles you to entry within your 30 minute entry window, and please note that you may need to queue for entry.
All pairs & groups are required to purchase the same ticket type, as each ticket’s entitlements are non-transferable.
Children under the age of 12 will need to be accompanied by an adult.
Each ticket admits one person which will be checked at entry, and is valid only on the date of the ticket.
Please note that a ticketing fee of $4 per ticket will be applied at checkout.
Re-entry is not allowed.
Tickets sold are non-transferable, non-refundable and void if altered or duplicated.
Children 2 years and younger enter for free.
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Kindly redeem your ticket at https://viewmybookings.globaltix.com/ to get the actual tickets.

Terms & Conditions: All pairs and groups are required to purchase the same ticket type, as each ticket's entitlements are non-transferable. Tickets can only be refunded or rescheduled if MOIC Ticket Insurance is purchased as an add-on upon upon checkout. Tickets sold are non-transferable, non-refundable and void if altered or duplicated. Children 2 years and under enter for free. Children under the age of 12 will need to be accompanied by an adult. Each ticket admits one person which will be checked at entry, and is valid only on the date of ticket. Re-entry is not permitted. Your ticket entitles you to entry within your 30 minute entry window, and please note that you may need to queue for entry. Museum of Ice Cream is not responsible and does not assume liability for any injury, damage or loss you may incur, whether such injury, damage or loss is caused by negligence or otherwise. Museum of Ice Cream may, without prior notice and without refund, compensation or any liability, change the operating hours, close and/or restrict admissions to the attraction due to capacity, inclement weather, special events or other reasons. For more information, visit our FAQs on our website.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
How to use: Please enter the attraction and present a valid ID that matches the name on the ticket.
What’s included: Access to Premium ice cream flavours
What’s included: 10% off all F&B and Retail purchases
What’s included: Priority queuing for entry
What’s included: A free VIP pin
